reviews.review_title: Great for hanging out with friends
reviews.review_description:
Definitely recommend this if you have ab big social gathering and want to have fun with your friends. The visuals are great and it's immersive the 3d print is an awesome idea, adds fun for everyone.
Be nice to see future updates and see what the developer adds!
These social apps aren't really my thing but i do recommend it , iíf you like Horizon worlds, then your love this.
Well done for all your hard work, it's paying off, as this has been out for awhile now, nice improvements.

Hang out with your friends like never before  in this new and innovative app . Here are some reasons why I like it the environment is amazing and stunning. Anything  you imagine can be made there are games and more . The graphics and visuals  are amazing this app is both new and innovative its single user multiplayer  all in all its a great app  you should try it you won't be disappointed.

This game is an absolute blast! The crisp visuals are stunning, making everything feel so immersive—it’s like being a kid again, discovering something magical for the first time. The replicator is a truly unique feature that keeps me coming back. I haven’t laughed this hard in ages, especially while experimenting with all the creative possibilities it offers.

The built-in browser window is a game-changer, especially for sharing YouTube videos with friends. It turns the whole experience into the ultimate hangout spot. Whether you’re exploring, creating, or just chilling, this game is the perfect mix of fun and functionality. Highly recommend it!

It’s a fun game similar to meta horizon worlds where you can chill and hang out with people but other then that u have to pay a monthly subscription to get the cool gadgets so its a good game if ur bored and want to just hang out in vr

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! We hope you have tons of fun and we'll continue adding fun updates!

reviews.review_description: Using AI to 3D print anything is OP!! Love it, I laughed as hard as I ever have in VR printing stuff with friends. 10/10!!
The visuals are top notch too - lots of potential. One guy made a lot of stormtroopers on the beach - I’m curious to see where this app goes in the future.
